items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of 'Typed artifact metadata (image/video/doc/transcript/whiteboard)'. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm the existence of such metadata. The linked use case mentions the need for typed artifact metadata but lacks specific evidence to demonstrate that this requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive status.
